title: xarop
description: Front-end engineer. Blog, portfolio i xarop.
body: # hello, I'm Adrià. I am a **front-end engineer**. I write code — mostly semantic HTML and modern CSS — and sometimes words too. There are three things in here: - a **[blog](./blog/)** with technical notes and various reflections, - a **[portfolio](./portfolio/)** with selected projects, - and a **[cv](./cv/)** in case you want to hire me. *xarop* is a flavor concentrate: it is the Swedish *saft*, the British *squash* or the classic *jarabe* or *sirope*. This site has flavors: , , , , , and . Click one — the web repaints itself. There is no database. No JavaScript (except for optional stuff). Just HTML, modern CSS and a bit of Markdown. Hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://github.com/xarop/web), maintainable in a *push*. --- ## What moves me The web should be fast, accessible and editable by anyone. I've learned that the most reliable way to achieve this is to take things away, not add them. **Less is more.** --- ## Do you work together? https://xarop.com/ If you have a web project, you can find my services at **[xarop.com](https://xarop.com/)**. - **Tailored websites** — Landings, corporate sites, publishing portals and online stores - **Web Migrations** — From WordPress to modern technologies, without technical debt - **Integrations with AI** — Chatbots, automations, RAG and content generation - **Optimization and refactoring** — Improved performance and Core Web Vitals Open and auditable code, without *lock-in*. From brief to production in 2–4 weeks. --- ## Contact - **Email** — [ajl@xarop.com](mailto:ajl@xarop.com) - **Whatsapp** — [+34 620 58 26 26](https://wa.me/34620582626) - **LinkedIn** — [linkedin.com/in/xarop](https://www.linkedin.com/in/xarop) - **GitHub** — [github.com/xarop](https://github.com/xarop) Write to me! No preamble: straight to the point. ---
